text: The course started really well and followed on nicely from the first course in the series but I ' m really disappointed and frustrated with the video editing issues . Many were fixed but there are still some errors / omissions and the second half of the course was very short of content compared to the rest . Such a shame as I ' m sure the writers really know their material and conveyed so well when the content was there . I ' m looking forward to the next course and hope the material is all ready to go !
